scripts.build: npm --prefix prime-cloud install && npm --prefix prime-cloud run build && npm --prefix prime-cloud/deploy install --production && cp -r prime-cloud/apps/pos/dist/* prime-cloud/deploy/public/pos/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r prime-cloud/apps/api/dist/* prime-cloud/deploy/api/ 2>/dev/null; if [ -d prime-cloud/apps/dashboard/out ]; then rm -rf prime-cloud/deploy/public/dashboard && cp -r prime-cloud/apps/dashboard/out prime-cloud/deploy/public/dashboard 2>/dev/null; fi
